metadata.title: Soundscapes
metadata.description: Adds a music/ambiance (E.g. lofi, white noise) player to the status bar to help with concentration. Also allows you to play your own local music files.

regex.source:
Notice(
      "There is a beta update available for the Soundscapes plugin. Please update to to the latest version to get the latest features!",
      0
    )
regex.target:
Notice(
      "Soundscapes 插件有一个测试版更新。请更新至最新版本以获得最新功能！",
      0
    )

        "Please set music file path in settings to use My Music feature of Soundscapes.",
        0
      )

regex.source: .error("forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported")
regex.target: .error("forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported")
name: "吸血鬼：化装舞会 \u2013 血统"

regex.source: text: "Custom soundscapes allow you to create your own playlists of youtube videos that can be selected as a soundscape."
regex.target: text: "自定义音景允许您创建自己的 YouTube 视频播放列表，可以选择这些视频作为音景。"

regex.source: text: "The My Music Soundscape plays music files from your local computer. It includes a dedicated view for managing your music in addition to the mini-player on the statusbar."
regex.target: text: "我的音乐音景播放本地计算机中的音乐文件。除了状态栏上的迷你播放器之外，它还包括用于管理音乐的专用视图。"

regex.source: .setDesc("What would you like to call the soundscape?")
.setDesc("Id of the Youtube video for the track")
.setDesc("Which soundscape would you like to listen to?")

regex.target: .setDesc("启动时自动播放选定的 soundscape？")

regex.source: .setDesc("Save space on the status bar by scrolling song title?")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过滚动歌曲标题来节省状态栏空间？")
